LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ELIZABETH CALDER'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED $9,000 IN REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 425.16(C). MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH CALDER's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS Granted. No opposition filed. Defendant is awarded $9,000 in reasonable attorney's fees pursuant to CCP sec. 425.16(c). Prevailing party to prepare proposed order. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
